title: EAE CORE INGESTION v0 — local file accept/hash/manifest/idempotency
reason: Prove safe local acceptance, type/hash determination, reproducible manifests, and duplicate-free registry before any scoring or remote acquisition.
decision: Implement modular eae/core ingestion for local files only (.obj required; .glb allowlisted).
Idempotency means same bytes + same ingestion_policy_version → same asset identity and no duplicate authoritative registry entry; repeats may log ALREADY_INGESTED with state_mutation false.
Distinguish ACCEPTED, REJECT_UNSUPPORTED, QUARANTINE_TYPE_MISMATCH, REJECT_MALFORMED, REJECT_SECURITY, ALREADY_INGESTED.
Do not activate rubrics, mutate passports, download remotes, or expand frozen rc1 schemas.
Authoritative status after suite execution is recorded in EAE_CORE_INGESTION_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md.
